历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 13407 → 20574 → 22438 → 17105 → 21787, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a baseline of about 21787 in 2025. The ranking fluctuated significantly over the past five years, with a backward shift of about 7167 places from 2021 to 2022, a recovery to 17105 in 2024, and another backward shift to 21787 in 2025. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan remained at 24 students from 2021 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction signals for six consecutive years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 75–80 range in recent years, maintaining a steady comprehensive strength and brand recognition. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only one film controversy related to a university director, with no significant positive or negative impact on application popularity. Douyin popularity ranks 70th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. Psychology is A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, and Physical Education is A-, highlighting strong disciplines in teacher training and psychology, which strongly attract candidates interested in teacher education.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the social popularity of teacher training majors has steadily increased, with the stability of the teaching profession being recognized. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou (a first-tier city), offering some cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates. The university's enrollment in Shaanxi is relatively small (24 students in physics category), accounting for about 1.4% of enrollment, which is a medium-to-small scale among out-of-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking fluctuation trends, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 19.7% in provincial physics category candidates, and the stable university reputation, it is expected that intensified competition in 2026 will further push the minimum ranking backward from the 2025 baseline of 21787. The predicted minimum ranking is about 22007, with a range of 21507–22507.
